cms.task_text: Kód má nakreslit [hlp]červenou a modrou čáru[/hlp], ale barvy jsou přehozeny. Opravte je.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="50" y="50"><field name="COLOUR">#0000ff</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed"><field name="COLOUR">#ff0000</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
